updated_by: claude-agent (Sprint v3.7 — FEAT-005 Phase 2: Compound V3 read-only RPC integration — real eth_call decoding of Comet.balanceOf + chained getUtilization/getSupplyRate via stdlib urllib, 3-RPC fallback, [FALLBACK] degrade-to-mock safety; mirrors v3.6 Aave Phase 2 pattern)

ideas.title: Mac Mini Local Server
ideas.description: Run SPA on a dedicated Mac Mini instead of GitHub Actions — persistent process, no cron cold-start latency, local SQLite with faster I/O.

ideas.title: Mobile App (React Native)
ideas.description: iOS/Android companion app showing portfolio status, PnL, alerts, and Go-Live countdown. Push notifications for risk events.

ideas.title: Discord Bot Integration
ideas.description: Deliver daily digest, risk alerts, and agent Q&A replies via a Discord bot in a private server — alternative to Telegram.

ideas.title: Multi-User Portfolio Support
ideas.description: Allow multiple owners each with their own capital allocation, risk limits, and PnL tracking — enabling future fund-like structure.

features.title: Phase 3: Real Capital Execution (v2.0)
features.description: Full live-capital execution layer: Aave SDK + Compound SDK integration, real transaction signing, kill-switch tested with real funds, PostgreSQL migration, VPN access. Triggered after go-live ADR on 2026-07-15.

features.title: Phase 4: Multi-Strategy Live Portfolio
features.description: Run v1_passive, v2_aggressive, v3_pendle_focused simultaneously with real capital. LangGraph orchestration. Message Bus (Redis). Cross-strategy capital rotation based on performance.

features.title: Phase 5: Investor Reporting
features.description: Automated weekly/monthly investor reports (PDF + email). React + TypeScript full dashboard (Phase 5). AG-UI Protocol / CopilotKit. Pixel-art agent avatars. Voice interface via OpenAI Realtime API.

features.title: Aave V3 Live SDK Integration
features.description: Replace paper-trade engine calls with real Aave V3 SDK transactions. Supply/withdraw USDC via ethers.js, signed with private key in secrets manager.

features.title: Compound V3 Live SDK Integration
features.description: Compound V3 Comet supply/withdraw integration. Rate comparison vs Aave on every cycle; auto-route to highest net APY within risk limits.

features.title: Real-Time Price Feeds
features.description: Chainlink / Pyth oracle integration for live USDC/USDT/DAI prices. Feed into risk calculations for stablecoin de-peg circuit breaker.

features.title: Advanced Kelly Sizing with Live Data
features.description: Replace synthetic covariance matrix with rolling 90-day live APY covariance from DeFiLlama. Dynamic Kelly fraction adjustment per cycle.

backlog.title: Mac Mini Server Setup
backlog.description: Configure Mac Mini as persistent SPA server post go-live. Install Python env, clone repo, set up launchd plist for auto-restart, configure VPN access.

backlog.title: Enable GitHub Pages (User Action)
backlog.description: One-time manual step: Settings → Pages → Source: GitHub Actions. Enables https://yurii-spa.github.io/SPA/ for dashboard and kanban.html.

backlog.title: Telegram Bot Setup (User Action)
backlog.description: Create @SPA_alerts_bot via BotFather, add TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID to GitHub Secrets. Enables daily digest and risk alerts.

backlog.title: Workflow Scope Token Push (User Action)
backlog.description: Generate a GitHub PAT with `workflow` scope to push .github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml. Current token lacks this scope. Use push_workflow.command.

backlog.title: Sky/sUSDS T1 Upgrade (Conditional)
backlog.description: When GSM Pause Delay on-chain confirmation ≥48h is detected by sky_monitor.py, promote Sky to T1 at 30% weight per ADR-006/007. Expected Q3 2026.

review.title: Push Dashboard v1.6 (index.html)
review.description: index.html with all 6 tabs (Home, Paper Trading, Analytics, Go-Live, Agents, System). Done locally, not yet on GitHub. Commit: feat: v1.6 dashboard.

review.title: Push Core Python Modules (20+ files)
review.description: All spa_core modules: paper_trading, risk, data_pipeline, backtesting, optimization, golive, analytics, agents, alerts, execution, message_bus, orchestrator, monitor. Done locally.

review.title: Push Test Suites (~140 tests, 20+ files)
review.description: All test files: conftest, test_optimization, test_backtesting, test_golive, test_email, test_alerts, test_pendle, test_analytics, test_api, test_paper_trading, test_replay, test_risk, test_sky, test_tournament, test_retry_logic, test_concurrent_fetch, test_rebalancing, test_e2e, test_apy_tracker.

review.title: Push Documentation Suite (10+ files)
review.description: docs/api_reference.md, docs/data_schema.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/paper_trading_guide.md, docs/operator_runbook.md, ADR-001, ADR-002, ADR-003, setup guides.

review.title: Push GitHub Actions Workflow (workflow scope)
review.description: .github/workflows/spa-run.yml + deploy-pages.yml. Requires workflow-scope token. Use push_workflow.command. Last blocker before full CI is live on GitHub.

review.title: Push KANBAN.json + kanban.html
review.description: New kanban board state file and HTML dashboard. Created in this session. Commit: feat: live kanban board state / feat: kanban board dashboard.

done.title: Strategy Registry (spa_core/strategies/strategy_registry.py)
done.description: Central registry for all trading strategies. StrategyMeta dataclass with id, name, type (lending/lp/yield_loop/wrapped), risk_tier (T1/T2/T3), target_apy_range, max_drawdown_pct. Methods: register(), get_all(), get_by_tier(), get_by_type(), as_list(), summary(). Global REGISTRY singleton with auto-load of built-in strategies.

done.title: S1 Conservative Lending Strategy (T1, ~4-6% APY)
done.description: spa_core/strategies/s1_conservative_lending.py. T1-only lending: Aave V3, Compound V3, Morpho, Sky/sUSDS, Yearn V3. Max 40% per protocol, 5% cash buffer. Rebalance if APY gap > 1 pp. Max 5 positions. Auto-registered in REGISTRY.

done.title: S2 LP Stablecoin Strategy (T2, ~8-12% APY)
done.description: spa_core/strategies/s2_lp_stable.py. Liquidity provision in stablecoin pairs (Curve, Uniswap v3). Fee APY premium (+4.5 pp) + base lending APY. IL monitoring (stop-loss at IL > 1%). Rebalance every 7 days or at +2 pp APY gap. Max 30% per pool. Auto-registered.

done.title: S3 Yield Loop Strategy (T3, ~15-25% APY)
done.description: spa_core/strategies/s3_yield_loop.py. Recursive Aave V3 lending: deposit USDC → borrow USDT (60% LTV) → re-deposit. Max 2 loops. Health factor monitoring (target HF=1.5, stop-loss at HF<1.3). Max 35% capital. Borrow rate model. Net spread check. PAPER TRADING ONLY until ADR approved.

done.title: Multi-Strategy Backtest Engine (spa_core/backtesting/multi_strategy_backtest.py)
done.description: Runs all registered strategies on the same historical data and compares them. StrategyResult dataclass with Sharpe, max_dd, calmar, risk_adjusted_score (composite). WalkForwardSlice with train/test splits and prediction_hit tracking. MultiStrategyBacktest.run_all(), walk_forward(train=60d, test=30d), leaderboard(), walk_forward_summary(). JSON export. CLI runner.

done.title: Strategy Agent — Periodic Backtest + Allocation (spa_core/agents/strategy_agent.py)
done.description: Rewrote strategy_agent.py. Runs multi-strategy backtest every 4h. Loads historical_apy.json or synthetic fallback (90 days). Computes risk-adjusted scores, picks winner. Walk-forward validation (60d train / 30d test). Builds allocation recommendation (T3 capped at 20%). LLM explanation via Claude Sonnet 4.6 (with deterministic fallback). Saves strategy_comparison.json + strategy_agent_report.json. CLI: --dry-run, --no-llm, --capital.

done.title: BUG: CI workflow never fetches fresh data — missing --fetch flag
done.description: .github/workflows/spa-run.yml line 43 runs `python spa_core/export_data.py` WITHOUT the `--fetch` flag. This means the export reads from whatever APY snapshots are already in SQLite and never calls DeFiLlama API. Fresh APY data never enters the DB via GHA. Fix: change to `python spa_core/export_data.py --fetch`. This is the #1 reason paper trading data may be stale.

done.title: MISSING: CI pytest doesn't run top-level tests/ directory
done.description: spa-run.yml line 31: `python -m pytest spa_core/tests/ -q`. This misses all tests in the top-level `tests/` directory: test_retry_logic.py, test_concurrent_fetch.py, test_rebalancing.py, test_seed_demo.py, test_integration_e2e.py, test_apy_tracker.py, test_dev_agents.py (~40+ tests). Fix: change to `python -m pytest spa_core/tests/ tests/ -q` or add `testpaths = spa_core/tests tests` to pytest.ini.

done.title: DEBT: Tests split across two directories — spa_core/tests/ and tests/ — confusing and incomplete CI
done.description: Tests exist in two places: spa_core/tests/ (~100 tests, covered by CI) and tests/ (~40 tests, NOT covered by CI). The split was created during v1.6 sprint but never resolved. Recommend: move all tests to spa_core/tests/ OR configure pytest.ini to discover both. Update CI command to cover both paths (linked to SPA-F002).

done.description: optimization/kelly.py: kelly_fraction(), half_kelly(), kelly_position_size(). optimization/markowitz.py: PortfolioOptimizer with projected gradient descent, max-Sharpe and min-variance modes, efficient frontier. AllocationRecommender combining both.

done.description: Complete REST API with 17 endpoints (/api/status, /api/protocols, /api/portfolio, /api/positions, /api/trades, /api/backtest, /api/golive, etc). WebSocket for real-time agent thought-bubble streaming.

done.title: Agent Decision Logger

done.title: Go-Live Readiness Checker
done.description: golive/checklist.py: 8 automated criteria (paper duration ≥56d, Sharpe ≥2.0, drawdown ≤5%, alerts live, policy versioned, diversification, data freshness). ASCII report card. golive_readiness.json export. Verdict: READY/ALMOST_READY/NOT_READY/BLOCKED.

done.title: Dashboard v1.0 — 5-Tab Integration

done.description: requirements.txt updated (reportlab, websockets, python-multipart). GitHub Actions: pytest before export, continue-on-error. conftest.py shared fixtures. 4 new test modules (optimization, backtesting, golive, email). 90/90 tests passing.

done.title: DeFiLlama Whitelist Correction
done.description: Fixed 12-pool whitelist (Arbitrum + Base chains only). Removed hallucinated/non-existent protocols. Whitelist now authoritative with only on-chain verified pools. fix: correct 12-pool whitelist.

done.description: Resolved RiskConfig field bug causing tournament scoring to crash on aggressive-tier strategies. StrategyTournament weighted scoring now fully operational with correct cross-strategy rankings.

done.title: Pendle PT Fetcher (7 Quality Gates)
done.description: pendle_fetcher.py: PT pool fetcher with 7 quality gates (maturity ≥30d, liquidity ≥$500K, underlying asset whitelist, TVL floor, APY sanity ≤50%, chain whitelist, oracle freshness). Pendle pools as T2 allocations.

done.title: PendlePosition + Allocation Sizing
done.description: paper_trading/pendle_strategy.py: PendlePosition dataclass and pendle_allocation_size() sizing logic integrating with RiskPolicy. Expected to close APY gap from ~4.2% toward 7.3% target.

done.title: ADR-002: Pendle PT Integration
done.description: ADR documenting Pendle PT integration rationale, quality gate definitions, risk considerations for fixed-yield PT positions, maturity roll-over strategy.

done.title: Advanced Portfolio Analytics
done.description: analytics/portfolio_stats.py: Calmar ratio, Sortino ratio, Ulcer Index, rolling Sharpe/drawdown windows. APY Gap Tracker panel in dashboard showing current vs target with per-protocol contribution breakdown.

done.title: Real-Time Risk Monitor
done.description: alerts/risk_monitor.py: RiskMonitor real-time alert engine. Triggers on drawdown breach, APY anomaly (spike >50% in 1h), stale data (>15min), kill-switch conditions. Integrates with Telegram alerts.

done.title: Sky/sUSDS GSM Monitor (3 RPC Fallbacks)
done.description: sky_monitor.py: on-chain GSM Pause Delay checker with 3 fallback RPC sources (primary Alchemy + 2 backups). Resolves flaky monitoring when single RPC is unresponsive. Sky remains at 0% until ≥48h timelock confirmed.

done.title: Agent Model Config Registry
done.description: agents/model_config.py: pluggable model assignment config decoupling agent roles from hardcoded model strings. CEO → Claude Sonnet 4.6, Monitoring → Claude Haiku 4.5, Data → Gemini Flash-Lite.

done.title: Dashboard v1.5 (APY Gap + Pendle + Day Counter)
done.description: Dashboard upgrade: APY Gap Tracker panel (4.2% vs 7.3% target), Pendle PT panel with quality gate badges, Day X/56 paper trading counter, 📡 Live badge (amber if data stale >15min). Dashboard v1.5.

done.title: Backtesting Replay UI
done.description: 📈 Backtesting Replay card on Analytics tab. Chart.js two-line equity chart (v1_passive blue, v2_aggressive orange). ⏱ Replay Mode slider by day, 500ms auto-play, syncs Paper Trading tab values. Strategy comparison table with winner highlighting.

done.title: Documentation Suite (4 files)
done.description: docs/api_reference.md (17 endpoints with schemas), docs/data_schema.md (14 JSON files), docs/architecture.md (ASCII diagram + agent hierarchy), docs/paper_trading_guide.md (8-week cycle + Telegram setup).

done.description: retry_request() with exponential backoff in defillama_fetcher + pendle_fetcher. pipeline_health.json after every export. Telegram alert if >2 sections fail or 0 pools fetched. 15-min timeout, artifact upload (7-day retention). 6 new tests.

done.title: Dashboard v1.6 — System Health Tab (6th Tab)
done.description: New ⚙️ System tab (hotkey 6) with 4 cards: Pipeline Health (🟢/🟡/🔴), Data Freshness (color-coded by age), Paper Trading Clock (countdown to next 4h cycle), Go-Live Countdown (Day X/56 progress bar). Auto-refreshes every 60s.

done.title: Operator Runbook
done.description: docs/operator_runbook.md (~2400 words). Day 1 setup, daily/weekly monitoring SOP, Sky upgrade procedure, go-live process, 6 incident scenarios with diagnostics, configuration reference table, v2.0 upgrade path.

done.title: Concurrent Pool Fetching + Cache
done.description: ThreadPoolExecutor parallel fetch (DeFiLlama + Pendle simultaneously). 1-hour file-based response cache in data/.cache/. Performance timing logged: [PERF] Fetched N pools in Xs. Cache dir in .gitignore.

done.description: spa_core/analytics/apy_tracker.py: maintains 90-day rolling APY history per protocol. Trend analysis: detecting APY acceleration/deceleration. Used by risk monitor for anomaly detection.

done.title: E2E Integration Test Suite
done.description: tests/test_integration_e2e.py: full pipeline mock tests — data fetch → risk policy → paper trade → export → API response. Validates the entire system end-to-end with mocked external APIs.

done.title: Wallet Scaffold (Execution Layer)
done.description: spa_core/execution/wallet.py: SPAWallet scaffold for future real-capital transactions. safety_checks.py pre-execution validation. position_monitor.py live position tracking. Not yet connected to real protocols.

done.title: Go-Live Activate + Daily Check
done.description: golive/activate.py: live-capital activation flow with all 8 safety checks. golive/daily_check.py: daily automated go-live criteria health check run at 08:00 UTC.

done.title: Paper Trading Go-Live (Day 1 of 56)
done.description: Paper trading activated 2026-05-20. v1_passive running live. Current APY: ~4.2%. 8-week test period ends 2026-07-15. Go-live decision gate: Sharpe ≥2.0, drawdown ≤5%, N≥15 trades, all agents stable ≥4 weeks.

done.title: BUG: WHITELIST (15 pools) vs POOL_WHITELIST (12 pools) — dual whitelist inconsistency in defillama_fetcher.py
done.description: defillama_fetcher.py has two whitelists: (1) WHITELIST (line 25, 15 pools, has pool_ids) used by collect_once() → fetch_all() → SQLite ingestion. (2) POOL_WHITELIST (line 144, 12 pools) used by DeFiLlamaFetcher.fetch_pools() → export/display. WHITELIST includes Spark USDC/USDT, Sky sUSDS, Fluid USDC/USDT, Ethena sUSDe which are NOT in POOL_WHITELIST. POOL_WHITELIST includes Compound V3 Arbitrum and Morpho Base which are NOT in WHITELIST. Result: different protocols get stored vs exported — APY data shown in dashboard doesn't match what's in the DB. Fix: unify into one source-of-truth whitelist.

done.title: BUG: export_data.py import path error — `from spa_core.analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`
done.description: export_data.py line ~295: `from spa_core.analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`. Since sys.path.insert(0, spa_core_dir) is done at the top, the correct import is `from analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`. The `spa_core.` prefix causes ImportError at runtime unless the parent of spa_core/ is also on sys.path. This section is wrapped in try/except so it silently fails, but apy_tracker never runs. Fix: change to `from analytics.apy_tracker import APYTracker`.

done.title: LOGIC: auto_allocate_v2() L2 chain set (includes Optimism+Polygon) differs from RiskPolicy L2 set (Arbitrum+Base only)
done.description: engine.py line 560: `_V2_L2_CHAINS = {'arbitrum', 'base', 'optimism', 'polygon'}`. RiskPolicy.l2_allocation_pct() (policy.py line 173): L2_CHAINS = {'arbitrum', 'base'}. Result: v2_aggressive applies L2 cap to 4 chains but RiskPolicy only enforces the cap on 2 chains. Positions on Optimism/Polygon bypass the L2 aggregate limit. Since Optimism/Polygon pools are not in the whitelist today, this is low-risk but the inconsistency is a latent bug.

done.title: BUG: activate.py always blocked — check_wallet_ready() returns PENDING permanently
done.description: golive/activate.py line 101: `all_pass = all(c['status'] == 'PASS' for c in criteria)`. Since check_wallet_ready() always returns PENDING (hardcoded, cannot auto-verify), the activation script WILL NEVER SUCCEED. This blocks the entire go-live path. Fix: either (a) add a manual-override flag/env var `SPA_WALLET_READY=1` that flips wallet criterion to PASS, or (b) exclude Wallet Ready from the `all_pass` check in activate.py the same way checklist.py excludes it from the verdict. Option (b) is simpler and consistent with checklist logic.

done.title: BUG: MIN_PAPER_DAYS=50 contradicts DEV_STRATEGY 8-week (56-day) requirement
done.description: golive/checklist.py line 39: `MIN_PAPER_DAYS = 50`. DEV_STRATEGY says '8+ weeks' = 56 days. engine.py uses `MIN_PAPER_WEEKS = 8` = 56 days. If checklist.py passes at 50 days, go-live could be unlocked 6 days early (Jul 9 instead of Jul 15). SPA-016 done card also specifies '≥56d'. Fix: change MIN_PAPER_DAYS to 56 in checklist.py.

done.title: LOGIC: _update_strategy_state() calls _load_portfolio_state() inside open DB transaction — read-before-commit
done.description: engine.py _update_strategy_state(conn) at line 1127 calls self._load_portfolio_state() which opens its OWN new DB connection. This is called while the caller already holds a write transaction (e.g., after INSERT paper_trade). In SQLite WAL mode, the inner read may see the pre-INSERT state, so strategy_state gets updated with stale position counts. The Sharpe stored in strategy_state may lag by one trade. Fix: pass the already-loaded state as a parameter to _update_strategy_state() instead of re-loading from DB.

done.title: DEBT: Dead code — avg_days variable in close_position() (engine.py line 225)
done.description: engine.py line 225: `avg_days = total_pnl / (total_amount * 0.0001 + 1)  # approx`. This variable is computed but never used or returned. The formula is also mathematically meaningless (PnL / fraction_of_amount). Remove this line to avoid confusion about what it calculates.

done.title: DEBT: Redundant check #7 in check_new_position() — T1 absolute cap equals T1 concentration limit
done.description: risk/policy.py: Check #6 enforces max_concentration_t1=40%. Check #7 enforces max_single_protocol=40%. For T1 protocols these are identical — check #7 can never trigger without check #6 already triggering. For T2 protocols, max_concentration_t2=20% means check #6 fires well before check #7 (40% cap). The absolute single-protocol check is effectively dead code. Consider either removing check #7 or changing max_single_protocol to a meaningful lower threshold (e.g., 35%).

done.title: BUG: Sharpe threshold mismatch — checklist uses ≥1.0, DEV_STRATEGY requires ≥2.0
done.description: golive/checklist.py check_strategy_performance() line 182: PASS when sharpe >= 1.0. DEV_STRATEGY v1.0 go-live criteria: 'Sharpe ≥ 2.0'. This means the automated checker could give a green light at Sharpe=1.1 when the stated go-live bar is 2.0. Decision needed: (a) keep ≥1.0 in code and update DEV_STRATEGY, or (b) raise code threshold to 2.0. Recommend (b): set threshold=2.0 consistent with DEV_STRATEGY. WARN range: 1.0–2.0. FAIL: <1.0.
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: BUG: daily_report.py max_dd display — fallback uses raw fraction (0.01) but formats as percent
done.description: alerts/daily_report.py lines 176-177: fallback `max_dd = portfolio.get('total_drawdown_pct', None) or 0.0`. status.json stores total_drawdown_pct as a decimal fraction (0.012 = 1.2%). Then line 222: `f'MaxDD: {max_dd:.1f}%'` formats without ×100, showing '0.0%' instead of '1.2%'. This only triggers when advanced_analytics.json is unavailable. Fix: multiply by 100 when falling back: `max_dd = (portfolio.get('total_drawdown_pct') or 0.0) * 100`.
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: LOGIC: check_diversification() uses deployed-only denominator, inconsistent with RiskPolicy
done.description: golive/checklist.py check_diversification() line 275: `frac = amt / total_deployed` (cash excluded). RiskPolicy.concentration_pct() uses `total / total_capital_usd` (cash included). Result: go-live checker sees higher concentration than RiskPolicy would, potentially blocking go-live when actual risk policy is fine. Example: 1 protocol, $30K in Aave, $70K cash → checker shows 100% concentration (FAIL), RiskPolicy shows 30% (OK). Fix: use `total_capital` as denominator in check_diversification().
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: LOGIC: check_drawdown_acceptable() FAIL threshold (4%) inconsistent with RiskPolicy kill switch (5%)
done.description: golive/checklist.py FAIL at drawdown >4%. RiskPolicy max_drawdown_stop=5%. DEV_STRATEGY says '≤5%'. A portfolio with 4.5% drawdown would: (a) pass RiskPolicy health check, (b) still be running, but (c) FAIL the go-live checker. This could incorrectly block go-live when the system is actually healthy. Fix: align go-live FAIL threshold with RiskPolicy kill switch at 5%. Suggest: PASS ≤3%, WARN 3–4.5%, FAIL >5% (= kill switch triggers).
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: DEBT: collect_once() / fetch_all() use old module-level WHITELIST — should use POOL_WHITELIST
done.description: defillama_fetcher.py: collect_once() iterates over module-level WHITELIST (15 pools, with pool_ids). DeFiLlamaFetcher.fetch_pools() iterates over POOL_WHITELIST (12 pools, fuzzy match). The fetch_all() → collect_once() path writes to SQLite using the old whitelist. This creates a mismatch between DB contents and what fetch_pools() would return. Resolve the dual-whitelist issue (SPA-B005) first, then deprecate collect_once() in favor of the class-based interface.
done.note: Fixed in prior sprint, KANBAN not updated

done.title: MISSING: Sky T1 promotion automation — sky_monitor.py has no auto-upgrade trigger
done.description: sky_monitor.py checks the on-chain GSM Pause Delay, but there is no code to automatically promote Sky to T1 when ≥48h is confirmed. The monitor logs the check but doesn't update the whitelist, notify via a risk event, or flag for human review. Fix: when sky_monitor.py confirms ≥48h, write a data/sky_upgrade_trigger.json sentinel, send Telegram alert, and update the operator runbook with the manual upgrade steps.
done.resolution: Implemented check_and_emit_upgrade_signal() in sky_monitor.py. Hooked into export pipeline in export_data.py. When Sky is ELIGIBLE, writes data/sky_upgrade_needed.json and injects risk_alert.

done.title: MISSING: Agent stability tracking — no code measures 'agents stable ≥ 4 weeks'
done.description: DEV_STRATEGY go-live requirement: 'All agents stable ≥4 weeks'. The go-live checklist has 11 criteria but NONE of them track agent stability duration. There is no mechanism to record when agents became stable, check uptime history, or fail on instability. Fix: add Criterion 12 to golive/checklist.py: 'Agent Stability — continuous stable operation ≥28 days'. Read from a new data/agent_stability.json that records first-stable timestamp and any restarts. Export from export_data.py.
done.implementation: Created spa_core/paper_trading/agent_stability.py (AgentStabilityTracker), data/agent_stability.json seed file. Updated checklist.py check_agent_stability() to use new tracker (reads status.json freshness). Updated export_data.py to call AgentStabilityTracker.update() on every export cycle.

done.title: Full 2-Year DeFiLlama Backtest (IDEA-005)
done.description: Created spa_core/backtesting/run_full_backtest.py. Fetches 730-day historical APY data from DeFiLlama chartData API for all 7 backtest protocols. Falls back to OU synthetic per-protocol if API unavailable. Runs BacktestEngine on real data. Saves results to data/backtest_full_2y.json (full results incl. equity curve) and updates data/backtest_metrics.json (metrics dict). Per-protocol breakdown: avg APY, interest earned, trade count. CLI flags: --days, --capital, --dry-run.
done.implementation: spa_core/backtesting/run_full_backtest.py — standalone runner. Uses BACKTEST_POOL_IDS (7 pools), DeFiLlama chartData endpoint, BacktestEngine (same as prod). Synced with data_pipeline/defillama_fetcher.py BACKTEST_POOL_IDS dict.

done.title: Strategy v3_pendle_focused — Pendle PT Yield Maximiser
done.description: Created spa_core/paper_trading/v3_pendle_focused.py with V3PendleFocusedStrategy class. Logic: (1) selects best Pendle PT pool with APY≥6% and days_to_maturity>30, (2) allocates up to 20% of capital in Pendle PT (T2 limit), (3) dynamic rotation: switches if new pool APY is 0.5pp+ better, (4) remaining capital in best T1 pools. Follows RiskPolicy v1.0 concentration limits. Registered in strategies.py as 'v3_pendle_focused'. Goal: close APY gap from ~4.2% toward 7.3% target via Pendle.
done.implementation: spa_core/paper_trading/v3_pendle_focused.py (V3PendleFocusedStrategy, AllocationDecision). strategies.py updated with v3_pendle_focused entry (imports from v3 module). Rotation threshold: ROTATION_THRESHOLD_PP=0.5pp. Min maturity: 30 days.

done.title: MISSING: wallet_ready criterion needs manual-approval mechanism for go-live activation
done.description: check_wallet_ready() in checklist.py always returns PENDING. For activate.py to succeed, this criterion must be PASS. No current code path exists to flip it. Fix: check for presence of a 'wallet_confirmed' sentinel file or env var SPA_WALLET_CONFIRMED=1, and if present, return PASS with a note that owner manually confirmed setup. This keeps security (manual step required) while allowing automation.
done.implementation: Created spa_core/golive/approve_wallet.py CLI (run: python -m spa_core.golive.approve_wallet). Creates data/wallet_ready_approved.json with {"approved": true, ...}. Updated checklist.py check_wallet_ready() to read JSON approval flag (primary) or sentinel (legacy). Updated activate.py to also write approval JSON on full activation.

done.implementation: 1) spa_core/backtesting/tournament.py — added 'v3_pendle_focused' to _STRATEGY_CONFIGS (max_single_protocol=0.40, min_apy_for_new_position=6.0, max_total_t2_allocation=0.20) and default strategies list (now 3-way: v1_passive + v2_aggressive + v3_pendle_focused). _build_recommendation() now handles 3+ strategies (top runner-up + 'also ahead of' tail). 2) spa_core/golive/checklist.py — check_tournament_winner() expanded for 3-way: PASS if winner in {v1_passive, v3_pendle_focused} or top-two tied; WARN if v2 wins with LOW confidence; FAIL if v2 wins with MEDIUM/HIGH confidence. Backwards-compatible with legacy v1+v2 only tournament_results.json. Criterion 10 docstring updated. 3) spa_core/export_data.py — section 18 fallback scores dict includes v3_pendle_focused. 4) spa_core/tests/test_tournament.py — added TestV3Integration (3 tests) + TestCheckTournamentWinner (7 tests). All 25 tournament tests PASS; 7 existing test_golive_extended.py::TestCheckTournamentWinner tests PASS (backwards compat verified).

done.title: BL-008 Phase 2 — Call-site migration (init_db + data_agent → connection abstraction)
done.description: Second phase of BL-008 PostgreSQL Migration. Migrated direct sqlite3.connect() call-sites to the dual-driver abstraction created in Phase 1. The legacy `database.init_db.get_connection(db_path)` is now a backwards-compatible delegator that builds a sqlite:/// URL when a Path is supplied, otherwise routes via env-resolved SPA_DATABASE_URL. init_database() gained a PostgreSQL branch (uses schema_postgres.sql + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). data_agent dropped a dead `import sqlite3`. defillama_fetcher already received connections externally — no changes. Goal: zero behavioural change in SQLite mode; PostgreSQL mode now boots end-to-end if SPA_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://... is set (still requires Phase 3 Alembic for prod). Phase 3 remaining: Alembic migrations + production cutover (~4h).
done.implementation: spa_core/database/init_db.py — get_connection() now delegates to spa_core.database.connection.get_connection() via a sqlite:/// URL built from the Path (back-compat preserved for engine.py and ~12 indirect consumers). init_database() routes by backend: SQLite path keeps sqlite3.executescript() bootstrap, Postgres path reads schema_postgres.sql + applies via psycopg2 cursor. _seed_protocols() takes a `backend` arg and switches between `INSERT OR IGNORE` (SQLite) and `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (key) DO NOTHING` (Postgres). check_database() gained a PG fast path that returns table counts without a filesystem stat. spa_core/agents/data_agent.py — removed unused `import sqlite3`; import path updated comment. Tests: 14/14 test_db_abstraction.py PASS; 555/565 full spa_core/tests/ suite PASS (10 pre-existing failures unrelated to this sprint: Sharpe-1.0 stale assertions, missing anthropic/fastapi modules in test env). Smoke test confirms SQLite mode boots a 15-protocol DB end-to-end via the new code path.

done.title: PostgreSQL Migration
done.description: Replace SQLite with PostgreSQL for production go-live. Alembic migrations, connection pooling, read replicas for dashboard queries. Pre-condition for v2.0.
done.implementation: Closed across three sprints: Phase 1 scaffold (SPA-T002, v2.7), Phase 2 call-site migration (SPA-T003, v2.8), Phase 3 Alembic + cutover (SPA-T004, v2.9). Result: SPA_DATABASE_URL env var selects backend; existing SQLite path byte-identical; PostgreSQL path boots end-to-end via Alembic baseline 0001_initial_schema; docs/postgres_cutover.md walks operators through bootstrap → data copy → flip → validate → rollback.

done.title: BL-008 Phase 3 — Alembic migrations + production cutover docs
done.description: Third and final phase of BL-008 PostgreSQL Migration. Adds Alembic scaffold (alembic.ini + env.py wired to spa_core.database.db_url + dual-dialect baseline migration covering all 7 SPA tables and 12 indexes). Cutover procedure documented end-to-end in docs/postgres_cutover.md (bootstrap → data copy → flip → validate → rollback). Verified hermetically against SQLite — Postgres branch is dialect-specific DDL that mirrors schema_postgres.sql.
done.implementation: spa_core/database/alembic.ini — Alembic config; sqlalchemy.url is placeholder, real URL comes from env.py via SPA_DATABASE_URL. spa_core/database/alembic/env.py — online mode wraps the resolved URL in a SQLAlchemy NullPool engine (sqlalchemy is a transitive alembic dep, no new top-level dep); offline mode emits raw SQL by dialect. spa_core/database/alembic/versions/0001_initial_schema.py — dual-dialect baseline: branches on op.get_bind().dialect.name, emits SERIAL/TIMESTAMPTZ/DOUBLE PRECISION on Postgres vs INTEGER AUTOINCREMENT/TEXT/REAL on SQLite, identical CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS for both. spa_core/database/alembic/script.py.mako — template for future revisions. spa_core/database/alembic/README — CLI cheat sheet. spa_core/tests/test_alembic.py — 5 deterministic tests (upgrade head, idempotency, downgrade base, current, init_db compatibility). All 5 PASS in 1.5s. docs/postgres_cutover.md (~2300 words) — operator runbook with rollback. requirements.txt += alembic>=1.13.0.

done.title: BL-008 Phase 1 — PostgreSQL Migration Scaffold (DB abstraction + tests + ADR)
done.description: First phase of BL-008 PostgreSQL Migration (architect_proposal pick). Env-driven dual-driver scaffold: SQLite stays default, PostgreSQL opt-in via SPA_DATABASE_URL. Existing call-sites untouched in this phase. Phase 2 will migrate sqlite3.connect → connection.get_connection. Phase 3 adds Alembic + production cutover.
done.implementation: spa_core/database/db_url.py (84 LOC) — env-driven URL resolver: get_db_url()/is_postgres()/is_sqlite()/get_sqlite_path(). spa_core/database/connection.py (95 LOC) — get_connection() ctx manager, lazy psycopg2 import, DriverNotInstalled(RuntimeError) subclass, sqlite3.Row vs RealDictCursor. spa_core/database/schema_postgres.sql (156 LOC) — PG port of schema.sql, SERIAL/TIMESTAMPTZ/DOUBLE PRECISION translations, all 7 tables + indexes + FKs preserved. spa_core/tests/test_db_abstraction.py — 14 deterministic tests (default URL, env override, is_postgres/is_sqlite, sqlite path extraction, connection row factory, psycopg2-missing graceful error). docs/ADR_005_postgres_migration_plan.md — 3-phase plan with alternatives & rollback. requirements.txt += psycopg2-binary>=2.9.0. Result: 14/14 PASS in 0.04s. No existing tests broken. BL-008 estimated ~30% complete.

done.title: Execution Router — cross-protocol APY arbitration (FEAT-005 dependency)
done.description: Pure-Python ExecutionRouter that wraps the per-protocol adapters (AaveV3Adapter, CompoundV3Adapter, plus future Morpho/Yearn) into a single dispatch interface. Implements the 'Rate comparison vs Aave on every cycle; auto-route to highest net APY within risk limits' behaviour explicitly called out in FEAT-005. Risk gates: min_apy / allowed_protocols / blacklisted_protocols / allowed_chains — all exclusionary, no silent fallback. Structural typing (Protocol-style duck typing) so new adapters plug in without touching router.py. Withdrawals are NOT APY-routed — caller must name the protocol (engine.py is authoritative on position location). Deterministic alphabetic tie-breaking. Phase 1 (this sprint) is pure routing; Phase 2 will swap engine.py adapter-direct calls for ExecutionRouter.route_supply() once go-live cutover lands.
done.implementation: spa_core/execution/router.py (ExecutionRouter class with route_supply/route_withdraw/select_best_protocol/get_apy_comparison/aggregate_balances/health_check). Cross-suite execution-stack regression PASS (79/79: aave_v3+compound_v3+price_feeds+router). Docs: docs/ADR_008_execution_router.md (3-phase rollout + rollback strategy via SPA_EXECUTION_ROUTING_MODE env flag).

done.title: FEAT-005 Phase 2 — Compound V3 read-only RPC integration
done.description: Second phase of FEAT-005 Compound V3 Live SDK Integration. Replaces the Phase 1 NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs of get_supply_apy and get_supply_balance with real on-chain eth_call decoding when dry_run=False. Mirrors SPA-V36-001 (Aave V3 Phase 2) 1:1: pure stdlib (urllib.request + json), no web3.py, no requests, no eth_account. New _eth_call helper (5s timeout, DEBUG logging of RPC URL + selector), _call_with_fallback round-robin across the 3 endpoints per chain (URL fragment #compound-v3-comet:... stripped before POST). Hardcoded selectors 0x6f307dc3 (getUtilization), 0x6fb1b0e9 (getSupplyRate(uint256)), 0x70a08231 (balanceOf). Balance pipeline: Comet.balanceOf(SPA_WALLET_ADDRESS env) → uint256 raw → divide by 10**6 (USDC base asset only on all chains in scope). Note: Comet's balanceOf already returns presentValue (incl. accrued interest), so no aToken-style indirection — one RPC call per asset, simpler than Aave's two-leg getReserveData+balanceOf round-trip. APY pipeline: two chained eth_calls — (1) Comet.getUtilization() → uint256 utilization (1e18-scaled), (2) Comet.getSupplyRate(utilization) → uint64 per-second rate (1e18-scaled). Annualised APY (%) = rate * SECONDS_PER_YEAR / 1e16 = rate * 31_536_000 / 1e18 * 100. Production-safe fallback: ALL live-path exceptions logged as [FALLBACK] WARNING and degraded to the Phase 1 _MOCK_APYS / _MOCK_BALANCES value (pipeline never crashes if RPC flakes or wallet env is missing). Write methods (supply / withdraw) still NOT_IMPLEMENTED — Phase 3 will add eth_account signing + raw eth_sendRawTransaction, paired with FEAT-004 Phase 3 cutover behind SPA_EXECUTION_MODE env flag.
done.implementation: spa_core/execution/compound_v3_adapter.py — added TOKEN_DECIMALS, SELECTOR_GET_UTILIZATION / SELECTOR_GET_SUPPLY_RATE / SELECTOR_BALANCE_OF, RPC_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, SECONDS_PER_YEAR; _strip_fragment / _pad_address / _pad_uint256 / _eth_call / _call_with_fallback; live paths in get_supply_apy (two-leg getUtilization+getSupplyRate) and get_supply_balance (single-leg balanceOf), both with [FALLBACK] degrade-to-mock policy. Tests: spa_core/tests/test_compound_v3_adapter_phase2.py — 16 deterministic tests across 4 classes (TestEthCallHelper×4, TestFallbackRouting×3, TestGetSupplyApyLive×5, TestGetSupplyBalanceLive×4); all PASS in 0.04s, zero network (every urlopen call patched). Phase 1 test test_live_mode_returns_zero replaced with test_live_mode_falls_back_to_mock_when_rpc_unreachable to reflect the new contract. Regression: 110/110 PASS on full execution-stack (aave_v3 phase1+2, compound_v3 phase1+2, router, price_feeds); broader spa_core/tests/ suite: 674 PASS, same 10 pre-existing failures as in SPA-T003 (Sharpe-1.0 stale assertions, fastapi/anthropic missing in test env — unrelated to this sprint).

done.title: FEAT-004 Phase 2 — Aave V3 read-only RPC integration
done.description: Second phase of FEAT-004 Aave V3 Live SDK Integration. Replaces the Phase 1 NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs of get_supply_apy and get_supply_balance with real on-chain eth_call decoding when dry_run=False. Pure stdlib (urllib.request + json) — no web3.py, no requests, no eth_account. New _eth_call helper (5s timeout, DEBUG logging of RPC URL + selector), _call_with_fallback round-robin across the 3 endpoints per chain (URL fragment #aave-v3-pool:... stripped before POST), hardcoded selectors 0x35ea6a75 (getReserveData) + 0x70a08231 (balanceOf), canonical USDC/USDT/DAI token addresses for ethereum/arbitrum/base. APY decoded from currentLiquidityRate at struct slot 2 (RAY → %  via /1e25). Balance pipeline: getReserveData → aTokenAddress at struct slot 8 → balanceOf(SPA_WALLET_ADDRESS env) → scaled by 6 (USDC/USDT) or 18 (DAI) decimals. Production-safe fallback: ALL live-path exceptions logged as [FALLBACK] WARNING and degraded to the Phase 1 _MOCK_APYS / _MOCK_BALANCES value (pipeline never crashes if an RPC flakes or wallet env is missing). Write methods (supply / withdraw) still NOT_IMPLEMENTED — Phase 3 will add eth_account signing + raw eth_sendRawTransaction.

Tests: spa_core/tests/test_aave_v3_adapter_phase2.py — 15 deterministic tests across 4 classes (TestEthCallHelper×4, TestFallbackRouting×3, TestGetSupplyApyLive×4, TestGetSupplyBalanceLive×4); all PASS in 0.04s, zero network (every urlopen call patched).
